title: crosshair custom
description: Fully Customizable Crosshair System – Adjust the shape, size, color, and opacity of your crosshair to match your playstyle, with options for dynamic or static designs.
body:
Enhance your combat experience with Precision Targeting Overlay, a lightweight mod that allows you to customize your crosshair and adds a dynamic indicator when aiming at players or mobs. Whether you're a PvP enthusiast or a survivalist, this mod gives you the edge by providing visual feedback for precise targeting.
Key Features:

Customizable Crosshair: Change the style, color, and size of your crosshair to suit your gameplay.
Target Indicator: A subtle yet clear visual cue appears when your crosshair is locked onto a player or mob, helping you track targets effortlessly.
Minimalist Design: The mod is designed to be unobtrusive, ensuring it doesn’t clutter your screen while providing essential information.
Easy Configuration: Adjust settings in game or via config files to tailor the mod to your preferences.
Why Use It?
Precision Targeting Overlay is perfect for players who want to improve their accuracy and situational awareness without overcomplicating their HUD. It’s ideal for both casual and competitive gameplay.
Installation:
Simply drop the mod into your mods folder and enjoy a more immersive and tactical experience!
press G to open menu!
